summary: FOUR_COLUMN layered feature hierarchy. Columns: raw Pixels → Edges (4 BLUE bar icons: horiz, vert, two diag) → Strokes (ORANGE loops + arc) → Digits (YELLOW '0', '8', '3'). GREY lines connect every pair between adjacent columns via Create with lag_ratio. Bottom YELLOW caption calls out that real networks don't actually decompose this cleanly — it's the explanatory story.
